message:
test: Comprehensive test suite updates and improvements

Common test infrastructure (tests/common/):
- artifacts.rs: Updated artifact generation helpers
- input_sim.rs: Input simulation improvements
- mock_terminal.rs: Better terminal mocking patterns

E2E tests:
- e2e_input_flow.rs: Streamlined input flow testing
- e2e_perf.rs: Significant refactoring for cleaner benchmarks
- e2e_render_cycle.rs: Improved render cycle assertions
- e2e_unicode.rs: Enhanced Unicode handling tests

Property tests:
- proptest_buffer_diff.rs: Buffer diff property tests
- proptest_color_ops.rs: Color operation properties
- proptest_text_unicode.rs: Unicode text properties

Other tests:
- fixtures_test.rs: Fixture validation
- golden_rendering.rs: Golden file comparisons
- pty_e2e.rs: PTY integration tests
- repro_issues.rs: Issue reproduction tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
